since_last: 49% of 99 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.47%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.05% · BTC +1.61% · Gold -0.76% · Nasdaq100 -0.35%. 49% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.47%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.47%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +6.00%
cards.body: Leaders: META +6.00%, SNAP +3.40%, PATH +3.14%, NXE +2.90%, UPST +2.72%. Laggards: RXRX -4.79%, TER -4.53%, MRVL -4.17%, INTC -4.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.00% at $149.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
